items.content_html: ML Vault 📘: A collaborative Obsidian vault for sharing and exploring AI and ML knowledge. Join us as we build, discuss, and contribute to a rich resource of notes, tutorials, and insights 🚀. Perfect for both beginners and experts 🧠. Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.

Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.

items.content_html: The getEvents script fetches calendar event data from a specified ICS (iCalendar) URL and displays events for the current date. This script can be used as a user command in the obsidian community plugin templater.
